---
id: list-available-tools
title: "List available tools"
description: "Returns a filtered set of available tools based on optional tool name parameters. If no filters are provided, all available tools are returned."
sidebar_label: "List available tools"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/tools/glean-api-tools
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List available tools"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/tools/list"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::info beta

This endpoint is in Beta. Expect changes and instability.

:::

Returns a filtered set of available tools based on optional tool name parameters. If no filters are provided, all available tools are returned.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

>
